scenario: MUTATION CONTROL — violates exactly one rule: built from valid-minimal-required-only with both voluntaryVatRegistrationYes and voluntaryVatRegistrationNo set to true at once, violating the voluntaryVatRegistration exclusivityGroups entry (at most one of its members may be true).
